title: Little Trees Air Freshener Tree MTR0063 Mai Tai Fragrance For Car Home Boat Caravan - Single Pack
features: An air freshener that you can hang just about anywhere

description: From the manufacturer LITTLE TREES - the iconic air freshener The popular Tree-shaped air freshener known as LITTLE TREES has been around for over 60 years. The LITTLE TREES air freshener is now enjoyed all over the world and has appeared in numerous movies and television shows - over 1,500 at the last count! With a great range of premium fragrances and designs on the unique, instantly recognisable, Tree-shape, this pioneering product has become a truly global symbol of freshness and superior quality. Recent Additions to the Range Cafe Step into your favourite café and take in the rich, nutty aroma of freshly ground coffee beans, sweet cream and warm vanilla Frosted Pine Frosted pine needles, cool peppermint, and mountain lavender come together to create a crisp, snowy wonderland United Kingdom A timeless British design paired with the signature LITTLE TREES Black Ice Scent Beach Days Enjoy a tranquil day at the beach as hints of neroli, musk, and white florals linger in the air A Choice of More Than 30 Fragrances Celebrate Celebrate any occasion with this delicious blend of vanilla cake and sweet buttercream frosting Daisy Chain A pleasantly delicate and feminine fragrance. Reminiscent of freshly cut daisies Coconut Escape to paradise with this dreamy blend of toasted coconut, nutty tonka bean and spiced vanilla Sherbet Lemon A distinctively sweet experience of lemon candy. A crisp and sharp citrus fragrance Clips 7 great fragrances clip them anywhere adds a splash of colour to your car interior The white and black inner surfaces do not contain fragrance and will not damage surfaces with which they come into contact. It is the colourful outer surface that contains the fragrance Fiber Cans Use a LITTLE TREES 'FIBER CAN' anywhere - in your vehicle, kitchen, bathroom, wardrobe, toilet, around pets, caravan, shoe cupboard and more Made with recycled Tree fiber Designed to deliver long-lasting, powerful fragrance Colourful and appealing inside Scratch & sniff sticker Great for car & home Bottles A wooden lid Thick lace Glass bottle 8 great fragrances to choose from
